summary: Complete testing of WorkSession (BEG SiteClock) module. All 12 backend tests PASSED. Frontend MyDayPage shows work sessions timeline correctly with summary bar, session items, and start/end buttons. All API endpoints verified working via direct curl tests.

issues: Admin user has no active projects assigned, so Start Session dialog shows empty project dropdown. This is expected behavior - projects come from attendance endpoint which filters by user assignment.

seed_data_creation: Test data created by pytest: 23+ sessions for today with various flags (auto_closed, split)
context_for_next_testing_agent: WorkSession module fully tested. Key data-testids: my-day-page, work-sessions-section, start-session-btn, end-session-btn, session-site-select, confirm-start-session, session-{id}. MyDayPage at /my-day shows sessions timeline below attendance buttons. Admin user hourly_rate=0 (no employee_profile) which is expected.

POST /api/work-sessions/start.note: Creates session with rate snapshot, returns session data

POST /api/work-sessions/end.note: Ends open session with duration + cost calculation

Auto-close on new start.note: Starting new session auto-closes previous with is_flagged=true, flag_reason=auto_closed

GET /api/work-sessions/my-today.note: Returns today's sessions with totals, has_open_session, is_overtime

GET /api/work-sessions/active.note: Returns currently open sessions with elapsed_hours

GET /api/work-sessions.note: List with filters (worker, site, date, is_flagged, is_overtime)

POST /api/work-sessions/{id}/split.note: Splits session by SMR type, creates new sessions

Start Session dialog with site select.note: Dialog opens, but admin has no assigned projects
